title: Cozy & Light
description: A good performing lightweight shaderpack designed for a little comfort in vanilla.
body:
**About**

Cozy & Light is a shader pack for Minecraft Java Edition. It's a simple, lightweight, shaderpack that adds better lighting, improves water, and more! This makes your game feel a bit more cozy than vanilla **Minecraft**.

**_We strive to let people with low end devices feel good about how Minecraft looks._**

![Village in daylight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0160a5f9fc083aa70579c9c40cb908018a850fd.png)
![Village at night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bc006b0c3011ed0d8c32b94e1abc9f3650e7cd1_0.webp)
